summary: Completed testing of Content Moderation system, Platform Status, and Settings page. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Content Moderation page loads with banned words and blacklisted numbers tabs, Settings page shows Platform Integrations with Twilio and Stripe Connected badges.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing banned words and blacklisted numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content moderation system fully functional. 6 banned words exist (asshole, fuck, fuck you, free money, guaranteed approval, canihavemoney). 1 blacklisted number exists (+15551234567). Platform integrations show Twilio and Stripe as Connected.

backend_moderation_crud.GET /api/moderation/banned-words: PASS - Returns all banned words for any authenticated user

backend_sms_moderation.POST /api/contacts/{id}/send-sms with ba: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Message blocked: contains prohibited word'
backend_sms_moderation.POST /api/sms/send to blacklisted number: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Cannot send to this number'

backend_phone_numbers.GET /api/phone-numbers/available: PASS - Returns real Twilio numbers (no fake placeholders)

frontend_content_moderation.page_loads: PASS - Content Moderation page loads for org_admin
frontend_content_moderation.banned_words_tab: PASS - Shows 6 banned words with add/delete functionality
frontend_content_moderation.blacklisted_numbers_tab: PASS - Shows 1 blacklisted number with add/delete functionality
frontend_content_moderation.data_testids: PASS - All required data-testid attributes present

frontend_settings.no_api_keys_visible: PASS - Users see connection status only, no API keys
